label: Continuum Anchorage
description: Continuum Anchorage functions as an interstitial spaceport set directly within the Brine Lattice’s interlinked continua, where engineered gradients of time and inertia permit controlled approach. Its docking galleries form a ring of black composite and radiant conductor-ribs, inscribed with transit indices that align arrivals to causality-safe vectors. Navigation pylons extend into the surrounding darkness and radiance, fixing local motion against the wider fields that define the Cosmos. Cargo concourses and pressure-sealed transit halls emphasize modular construction, enabling rapid reconfiguration as lattice conditions shift.
